/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libZetMedia.so -o libZetMedia.so CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/zetBusFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/commonDefine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/zetBusModule/zetCtlMdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/zetBusModule/zetHlsServerMdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/zetBusModule/zetLogServerMdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZetMedia.dir/zetBusModule/zetTranscodeMdl.cpp.o
